2127770.name: Sagres Demo
2127770.description:
About This Game

You become an explorer in 1480 and set out to find your missing father.

You will travel around the world collecting information and discover forgotten civilizations, myths, and ruins in the process. During your expedition, you can sail, battle, and engage in mini-games, recruit characters from all over the world as companions, and even customize your own ships.

Requirements

English language choice is now available. This is the Google Translated version, so the content may be a bit awkward.
2127770.supported_languages: 英语, 韩语, 日语
